free_text: Data of TOF measurement at Los Alamos National Lab.
Metallic Li layer on silver backing of 27.5 ug
Quasithermal neutron spectrum at kT = 25 keV.
Natural copper foils of 12 mm diameter, 0.2mm thick.
Gold foils were used in a Au-Cu-Au sandwich
to determine the integrated neutron flux.
BF4 ionization chamber - for neutron flux

Au samples: number of nuclei 3.31E+20 and 3.25E+20,

three and superseded. 85. -> 85.2 mb in DATA section.
